betrayal: {winner} just played {loser} like a rented piano.
A moment of silence for {loser}'s trust. …Moving on.
{winner} smiled the whole time, by the way.
{loser} came here in good faith. {winner} came here to win.
Somewhere, a tiny violin plays for {loser}.
{winner} would like everyone to know it was strictly business.
mutual_hold: Two vaults. Zero courage. The room deserved better.
{a} and {b} stared at each other and blinked simultaneously.
The bravest thing at this table right now is the candle.
mutual_share: Look at that — trust. Disgusting. +3 each.
{a} and {b} traded like adults. Suspiciously mature.
An actual act of good faith. Someone check on them.
Trust at this table? Bold strategy. It paid off.
{a} and {b} now know things. Watch their faces.
pairing: {a}, meet {b}. Again. With stakes this time.
{a} and {b} — one of you is about to regret this.
pairing_partner: {a} and {b}. Whatever happens next, you still share a home.
{a} versus {b}: the couples round. Sleep is earned tonight.
{a} and {b} — years of practice reading each other. Use it or fear it.
extort_open: {blackmailer} is holding something of yours, {target}. Let's talk terms.
{target}, {blackmailer} has your secret and a price. Business is business.
{blackmailer} clears their throat and slides a note across the table to {target}.
reveal_intro: It can be revoked. It cannot be un-heard. Here we go —
Last chance to look away. No? Wonderful —
This one leaves the vault and never goes back —
fold: {blackmailer} had the leverage and the nerve of a chihuahua.
All that menace, and {blackmailer} folds like a lawn chair.
{blackmailer} chose peace. The room chose disappointment.
burn: {actor} skipped the negotiation entirely. Respect. Fear, mostly.
{actor} chose chaos. The room thanks you, {actor}.
No terms. No mercy. {actor} just lit the match.
{actor} didn't come to bargain. {owner}, our condolences.
vault: {actor} chose discretion. +2, and everyone's a little nervous now.
The most dangerous player is the quiet one. +2, {actor}.
pay: {target} paid up. The secret sleeps another night.
Three points changed hands. {target}'s dignity remains intact-ish.
{target} did the math and reached for the wallet.
Paid in full. {blackmailer} accepts your business, {target}.
stall: We can wait. We have snacks.
Someone is thinking very hard. Or asleep.
style_change: Correction for the record: {name} is now {to}.
{name} has evolved. {from} is dead; long live {to}.
scoreboard: {leader} leads. For now. Nights like this turn.
{leader} on top — an aura of smugness settles over the table.
Standings so far. Memorize who wronged you.
{leader} is winning, which historically makes people targets.
closing: Villain of the night: {villain}, {vd} 🗡. Biggest sucker: {sucker}, betrayed {sn} times. Same time next week?
{villain} collected {vd} 🗡 and zero remorse. {sucker} trusted {sn} times too many. Goodnight!
Raise a glass to {villain} ({vd} 🗡), and pour one out for {sucker} ({sn} betrayals absorbed).
The record shows: {villain} was the knife ({vd} 🗡), {sucker} was the cushion ({sn} betrayals). Drive safe!
